nl_query: For each evaluator currently active, show their current workload: number of scripts assigned, number in progress, number frozen, number submitted, and the average time in hours between start and freeze for their attempts.
failed_sql: SELECT fc.name AS evaluator_name, COUNT(sa.id) AS scripts_assigned, COUNT(ea.id) AS in_progress, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'FROZEN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS frozen, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'SUBMITTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS submitted, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ea.frozen_at - ea.started_at)) / 3600) AS avg_time_hours FROM faculty_cache fc JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.faculty_cache_id = fc.id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.assignment_id = sa.id WHERE fc.is_active = TRUE GROUP BY fc.name ORDER BY scripts_assigned DESC LIMIT 50;
error: Validation failed (schema): Table or alias 'ea' is referenced (e.g. in an ON clause or SELECT list) but is not declared in the FROM/JOIN clauses. Add the missing table to the FROM list, or check JOIN ordering — a JOIN's ON clause cannot reference a table that appears later in the JOIN chain.
